zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Basset於大約1156年出生在英國奧可福爾希阿丁頓時，她的父親Thomas Basset27歲，母親Adeliza Dunstanville23歲。她於1181年與Guy de Craon II在英國奧可福爾希阿丁頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾卡斯特列索普享年69歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Basset于大约1156年出生在英国奧可福爾希阿丁頓时，她的父亲Thomas Basset27岁，母亲Adeliza Dunstanville23岁。她于1181年与Guy de Craon II在英国奧可福爾希阿丁頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾卡斯特列索普享年69岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Basset was born about 1156, in Headington, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Basset, was 27 and her mother, Adeliza Dunstanville, was 23. She married Guy de Craon II in 1181, in Headington, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1224, in Castlethorpe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Basset est née environ 1156, à Headington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Basset, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Dunstanville, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Guy de Craon II en 1181, à Headington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1224, à Castlethorpe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Basset um 1156 in Headington, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Basset 27 und ihre Mutter Adeliza Dunstanville 23. Sie hat 1181 in Headington, Oxfordshire, England Guy de Craon II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1224 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Castlethorpe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Basset è nata il circa 1156 nel Headington, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Basset, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Adeliza Dunstanville, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Guy de Craon II nel 1181, nel Headington, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1224, nel Castlethorpe, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Bassetが約1156年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘディントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Bassetは27歳，母Adeliza Dunstanvilleは23歳であった。1181年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘディントンでGuy de Craon IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアカストレソルペで69歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Basset(이)가 대략 1156년 영국 스퍼드실르 헤딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Basset(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza Dunstanville(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1181년 영국 스퍼드실르 헤딩턴에서 Guy de Craon II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 카스틀레소에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1156, em Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Basset, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Dunstanville, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy de Craon II em 1181, em Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1224, em Castlethorpe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Basset родилась около 1156 г. в местности хидингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Basset было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Dunstanville, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy de Craon II в 1181 г. в местности хидингтон, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1224 г. в местности кастлетаурп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Basset nació aproximadamente 1156, en Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Basset, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Adeliza Dunstanville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Guy de Craon II en 1181, en Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1224, en Castlethorpe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
